title: TriCore TC27D terminal
description: TriCore TC27D terminal documents terminal material for TC27D in the hardware domain. It is classified as an entity page for the mcu-family class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Related header, IfxShellCommand, Examples, 0Src/AppSw/Tricore/TC27Dlib/shellinterface/shellinterface. h, and 0Src/AppSw/Tricore/TC27Dlib/shellinterface/shellinterface. c, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include infineon, tricore, tc275, terminal, and tricore tc27d terminal, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts.
